hero.title: Handcrafted Moroccan Furniture
hero.description: Discover exquisite, custom-made furniture pieces that blend traditional Moroccan craftsmanship with contemporary design.

authenticCraftsmanship.title: Authentic Craftsmanship
authenticCraftsmanship.description: Each piece is handcrafted by skilled artisans using traditional Moroccan techniques passed down through generations.

customDesign.title: Custom Design
customDesign.description: Work with our designers to create bespoke furniture pieces tailored to your exact specifications and space requirements.

premiumMaterials.title: Premium Materials
premiumMaterials.description: We source only the finest woods, fabrics, and materials to ensure lasting beauty and durability in every piece.

exceptionalService.title: Exceptional Service
exceptionalService.description: From initial consultation to delivery and beyond, our dedicated team ensures a seamless experience every step of the way.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Space?
cta.description: Explore our ready-made collections or start your custom furniture journey today.

orderConfirmation.title: Order Confirmation
orderConfirmation.contactUs: Contact us via WhatsApp for any questions

customFurniture.title: Custom Furniture Atelier
customFurniture.subtitle: Bring your vision to life with our bespoke furniture service
customFurniture.description: Our expert artisans will work with you to create unique, handcrafted pieces that perfectly match your style and space requirements.
